name: Mindgard
oneliner: Automated AI red teaming and DAST-AI platform that continuously tests, measures, and remediates vulnerabilities across deployed AI systems — purpose-built for enterprise regulated environments.
finserv: Financial services explicitly listed as a served vertical. Multiple enterprise finserv clients confirmed. Cyber Innovation Prize (Infosecurity Europe 2024); Best Cybersecurity Startup (2025 Cybersecurity Excellence Awards).
team: Dr. Peter Garraghan (CEO, 10+ years AI security research, Lancaster University spin-out); Steve Street (COO). 11 PhDs on staff. Backed by .406 Ventures, Atlantic Bridge, Lakestar, IQ Capital.
thesis: Mindgard occupies the 'prove your AI is safe before deploying' layer — continuous DAST-AI as a compliance primitive for regulated institutions. The DAST framing maps onto existing AppSec procurement patterns in financial services.
evidence: Mindgard — Automated AI Red Teaming & Security Testing
